Notice Of Motin To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kimble Cook, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Fine Line construction, Inc.
No other appearance

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Peter Cassidy's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant's objections to the special interrogatories and form interrogatories are overruled. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's objections to Request For Production Numbers 1-3, 5-13, and 15-23 are overruled. The responses are inadequate. Defendant is ordered to respond further and to produce within 15 days of notice of this order. As to Number 14, Defendant's objections are overruled except as defendant may redact any document which may have privileged portions, and shall state with particularity the basis for the redactions.
The court finds that the objections and responses were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $1,000, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-21-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-08-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613
